keyEvents.text: Etienne Vaessen (Suriname) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Suriname 0, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1. Oalex Anderson (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal.
Myenty Abena (Suriname) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.
Goal!  Suriname 1, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1. Sheraldo Becker (Suriname) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Suriname 2, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1. Jeredy Hilterman (Suriname) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Immanuel Pherai with a cross.
First Half ends, Suriname 2, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1.
Goal!  Suriname 3, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1. Justin Lonwijk (Suriname) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Gyrano Kerk.
Substitution, Suriname. Shaquille Pinas replaces Myenty Abena.
Substitution, Suriname. Jaden Montnor replaces Gyrano Kerk.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Kirtney Franklyn replaces Steven Pierre.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Saviola Blake replaces Oryan Velox.

Goal!  Suriname 4, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1. Jaden Montnor (Suriname) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ridgeciano Haps with a through ball.
Substitution, Suriname. Virgil Misidjan replaces Justin Lonwijk.
Substitution, Suriname. Renske Adipi replaces Immanuel Pherai.
Kevin Francis (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Aaron Jackson replaces Kennijah Joseph.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Garret Leigertwood replaces Najima Burgin.
Substitution, Suriname. Jamilhio Rigters replaces Jeredy Hilterman.
Stefano Denswil (Suriname) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Addeen Charles replaces Diel Spring.
